description:
39-year-old Digital Creator based in Rostock (DE).
  - Freelance; mostly works from home or small shared studios.
  - Lives in a central district with easy access to cafés and coworking spaces.
- Lifestyle & routine
  - Sedentary work style with long hours at the computer for editing and content production.
  - Mornings are relatively structured (emails, planning, light breakfast).
  - Afternoons and evenings dedicated to creative work, with occasional short walks outside.
  - Weekends used for groceries, house chores and occasional relaxed outings.
- Mobility patterns
  - Short, regular movements within Rostock between home, cafés and a few usual work spots.
  - One or two rare trips outside the city during the year that appear as outliers in her trajectory.
- Personality & social habits
  - Quiet, routine-oriented and comfortable working alone.
  - Prefers small groups over large crowded events.
- Health-related behaviors
  - Physical activity low-to-moderate, mostly walking between nearby locations.
  - Sleep generally stable around 6.5–7.5 hours with occasional late work nights.
  - Uses healthcare for routine check-ups and a few lifestyle coaching sessions focused on posture and breaks.
  - Environmental exposure moderate, mainly typical urban roads and neighborhoods.

36-year-old Digital Creator based in Stoke-on-Trent (UK).
  - Freelance; divides time between home, coworking spaces and on-site shoots.
- Lifestyle & routine
  - Creative lifestyle with mildly irregular hours depending on client projects.
  - Some days start early for calls, other days extend late into the evening for editing.
  - Weekends mix short trips for workshops or shoots with quieter days at home.
- Mobility patterns
  - Regular movements within Stoke-on-Trent between home, coworking spots and local clients.
  - Occasional travel to other cities for short projects or events that appear as multi-day clusters in the data.
- Personality & social habits
  - Outgoing but selective; enjoys collaborating with other creatives while keeping time for focused solo work.
  - Participates in local events, screenings and small creative meetups.
- Health-related behaviors
  - Physical activity moderate, alternating sedentary editing days with more active shoot days.
  - Sleep quality generally good but fluctuates around tight deadlines.
  - Uses healthcare mainly for routine check-ups and some coaching sessions on stress and work–life balance.
  - Environmental exposure typical of a medium-sized city with occasional stays in quieter, more rural surroundings.

56-year-old Investor based in Hamburg (DE).
  - Frequently travels for meetings, conferences and site visits.
- Lifestyle & routine
  - Structured but intense schedule with back-to-back meetings, calls and document reviews.
  - Plans her weeks ahead, reserving some time for light exercise and recovery.
- Mobility patterns
  - Dense activity within Hamburg, commuting between residential areas and business districts.
  - Regular international trips that appear as compact clusters of locations in other cities.
- Personality & social habits
  - Pragmatic and decisive, comfortable with high responsibility and complex decisions.
  - Social activity is often tied to business dinners and professional events rather than purely leisure.
- Health-related behaviors
  - Physical activity moderate, mostly walking in cities and occasional use of hotel or office fitness facilities.
  - Sleep reasonably good but periodically disrupted by jet lag and late-night work.
  - Relies on scheduled routine check-ups and a small number of targeted preventive screenings.
  - Environmental exposure relatively high due to airports, major cities and heavy-traffic business areas.

31-year-old Ride-share Driver based in Tonawanda (US).
  - Works mainly in the Buffalo–Tonawanda area.
- Lifestyle & routine
  - Highly irregular working hours, including late evenings and nights.
  - Few fixed routines; off days are mostly used to catch up on sleep and personal errands.
- Mobility patterns
  - Intense local movements across the region, covering residential zones, nightlife areas and transport hubs.
  - Location data shows long spans spent driving and waiting near busy pick-up points.
  - No major long-distance trips during the more critical periods of the year.
- Personality & social habits
  - Friendly with passengers but quickly drained by constant interaction.
  - Social life intermittent, often cancelled when feeling too tired after long shifts.
- Health-related behaviors
  - Physical activity low in structured terms, with long sedentary periods behind the wheel.
  - Sleep highly irregular, alternating short nights and heavy recovery sleeps.
  - Increasing use of healthcare over time, from routine check-ups to more frequent preventive screenings and coaching sessions triggered by fatigue and sleep issues.
  - Environmental exposure high due to many hours spent in traffic, near major roads and nightlife districts.

30-year-old Delivery Worker based in Berlin (DE).
  - Works mainly with bike or scooter deliveries.
- Lifestyle & routine
  - Very active daily routine with long hours spent moving between different parts of the city.
  - Eating schedule sometimes irregular, with quick snacks during work and proper meals on rest days.
- Mobility patterns
  - Dense and wide coverage of Berlin, reflecting frequent deliveries across multiple neighborhoods.
  - Occasional trips abroad or to distant regions that show up as short, intense clusters of locations.
- Personality & social habits
  - Energetic and sociable, enjoys discovering new corners of the city while working.
  - Maintains a stable network of friends and colleagues and often joins local events.
- Health-related behaviors
  - Physical activity high and consistent due to the physical demands of the job.
  - Sleep generally good, around 7–8 hours, with occasional disturbances in peak work periods.
  - Uses healthcare for routine check-ups, occasional screenings for joint and back health, and some coaching on workload management and recovery.
  - Environmental exposure medium-to-high, balancing traffic and weather conditions with regular time spent outdoors and in green areas.
